mapper.select:
SELECT T.* FROM (${sql}) T
ORDER BY

if.test: bpAuthority == "1" and bpNodeCode != null and bpCode != null

sql.if: AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM T_LCDP_BP_INST I, T_LCDP_BP_INST_NODE K, T_LCDP_BP_INST_NODE_ROLE R, T_CORE_ROLE_USER U WHERE I.ID = K.BPINSTID AND I.BPCODE = #{bpCode} AND I.BIZID = T.ID AND K.ID = R.BPINSTNODEID AND R.ROLEID = U.ROLEID AND K.BPNODECODE = #{bpNodeCode} AND U.USERID = #{loginUser.id} UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM T_LCDP_BP_INST I, T_LCDP_BP_INST_NODE K, T_LCDP_BP_INST_NODE_USER U WHERE I.ID = K.BPINSTID AND I.BPCODE = #{bpCode} AND I.BIZID = T.ID AND K.ID = U.BPINSTNODEID AND K.BPNODECODE = #{bpNodeCode} AND U.USERID = #{loginUser.id}) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER U WHERE U.BPCODE = #{bpCode} AND U.BPNODECODE = #{bpNodeCode} AND U.BIZID = T.ID AND U.USERID = #{loginUser.id})
